name: orion-sixfoot-controller
description: Codex plugin for Orion SixFoot Titan BLE reverse-engineering artifacts, packet encoders, and live capture helpers.

interface.shortDescription: Encode and inspect Orion SixFoot Titan control packets
interface.longDescription: Provides a structured protocol spec, motion packet encoders, and live Frida capture helpers for the Mu Xing Li Ming Orion SixFoot Titan robot.
defaultPrompt: Encode a forward motion packet for Orion SixFoot Titan.
Show the BLE UUIDs and packet formats for SixFoot Titan.
Prepare a live Frida capture plan for the handshake cipher.
